title: thelypteris mollicula
intro: Thelypteris mollicula, also known as the soft polypody fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris mollicula include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in traditional medicine to alleviate various health conditions.
